'''Dalabar Micro-Electronics''' was a company that developed a line of surveillance and detection systems and devices. They had over two [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of experiencing in serving the needs of security-minded customers, and developed a reputation for being discrete and producing quality merchandise. They manufactured the [[SDS-632 Surveillance Detector]] and the [[NI-632]] [[noise inhibitor]].

{{Company-stub}}
